languages.text: Загадочный молочно-белый обломок словно излучает глубокую тоску и неудержимую ненависть.
Deep longing and uncontrollable hatred seem to emanate from the mysterious milky-white shard.
languages.original_text: Загадочный молочно-белый обломок словно излучает глубокую тоску и неудержимую ненависть.

traits.locale_text: Deep longing and uncontrollable hatred seem to emanate from the mysterious milky-white shard.
Deep longing and uncontrollable hatred seem to emanate from the mysterious milky-white shard.
Deep longing and uncontrollable hatred seem to emanate from the mysterious milky-white shard.

languages.text: 那块神秘的乳白色碎片似乎散发着深深的渴望与无法遏制的仇恨。
languages.original_text: Deep longing and uncontrollable hatred seem to emanate from the mysterious milky-white shard.

traits.locale_text: 那块神秘的乳白色碎片似乎散发着深深的渴望与无法遏制的仇恨。

languages.text: Una profunda añoranza y un odio incontrolable emanan del fragmento blanco lechoso.
languages.original_text: Deep longing and uncontrollable hatred seem to emanate from the mysterious milky-white shard.

traits.locale_text: Una profunda añoranza y un odio incontrolable emanan del fragmento blanco lechoso.

languages.text: Un désir profond et une haine incontrôlable émanent de l'énigmatique fragment teinté d'un blanc laiteux.
languages.original_text: Deep longing and uncontrollable hatred seem to emanate from the mysterious milky-white shard.

traits.locale_text: Un désir profond et une haine incontrôlable émanent de l'énigmatique fragment teinté d'un blanc laiteux.

languages.text: Gizemli süt beyazı parçadan derin bir özlem ve kontrol edilemez bir nefret yayılıyor gibi görünüyor.
languages.original_text: Deep longing and uncontrollable hatred seem to emanate from the mysterious milky-white shard.

traits.locale_text: Gizemli süt beyazı parçadan derin bir özlem ve kontrol edilemez bir nefret yayılıyor gibi görünüyor.

languages.text: Ein tiefer und unkontrollierbarer Hass scheint von dem geheimnisvollen milchig-weißen Splitter auszugehen.
languages.original_text: Deep longing and uncontrollable hatred seem to emanate from the mysterious milky-white shard.

traits.locale_text: Ein tiefer und unkontrollierbarer Hass scheint von dem geheimnisvollen milchig-weißen Splitter auszugehen.

languages.text: 謎の乳白色の破片からは、深い憧憬と抑えきれない憎悪が漂っているようである。
languages.original_text: Deep longing and uncontrollable hatred seem to emanate from the mysterious milky-white shard.

traits.locale_text: 謎の乳白色の破片からは、深い憧憬と抑えきれない憎悪が漂っているようである。
